owner_operator_stated: Dr. Michael Goone (DDS, University of Illinois 1983) founded/led the practice and, per its own About page, 'retired mid-2026 to enjoy more time with his family'; Dr. Krizia Pallarca (DMD, Midwestern University) is now practicing at this location.
notes: Address (4355 W Howard St, Skokie IL 60076) and phone (847-679-0110) match exactly on the practice's own site. Vendor hint (Leadingedgedentalcenter.Com) confirmed correct. Appears independent, single-location, not part of a chain/DSO. Founding dentist Dr. Goone retired mid-2026; Dr. Pallarca now practices there. No careers/hiring page found.

public_practice_name: Abt Dental Associates, LLC (dba Willis Abt Dental Practice)
owner_operator_stated: Practice co-owned by Dr. Elliot Abt and Dr. Paul Willis (site's own team pages, and the site's registered domain is 'abt-willis.com'); Dr. Randall Hirsh is an additional dentist on staff.
notes: Address (Concourse Office Plaza, 4709 Golf Rd, Suite 1005, Skokie IL 60076) matches the record's normalized address exactly. Site's listed phone (847-677-2404) differs from the vendor record's phone (847-673-6770); no other entity was found holding the record's phone number, so this is treated as the same practice with an updated/alternate phone line, not an ownership change. Vendor hint (Vlaudds.Com) did not resolve to this or any live site and was not used. No careers/hiring page found.

public_practice_name: Douglas R. Hasegawa, DDS (with Dr. Roy Hamamoto, DDS) — different practice now at this address

notes: SUCCESSOR/MISMATCH: vendor hint site pearldentalgroup.net is a real Pearl Dental Group business, but its Skokie office sits at a different street number and phone (3537 W. Dempster St / 847-673-4303) than this record (3347 Dempster St / 847-674-0577). This record's exact address+phone are independently corroborated by multiple directories as belonging to Dr. Douglas Hasegawa, DDS (practicing with Dr. Roy Hamamoto, DDS), not Pearl Dental Group. owner_operator_stated: Father-daughter team: Dr. Joseph Sodini (owner/founder, DDS, Loyola University 1985) and Dr. Samantha Sodini (DMD, Midwestern University 2016), per the practice's own site.
notes: Address (4923 Oakton St, Skokie IL 60077) and phone ((847) 676-9292) match exactly on the practice's own site. Vendor hint (Sodinidental.Com) confirmed correct. Independent family practice, no chain/DSO affiliation found. No careers/hiring page found.

owner_operator_stated: Co-owned by Dr. Nathan Pinsky ('Dr. P') and Dr. Jesus Echezarreta ('Dr. E'), both Marquette University DDS grads, per the practice's staff page; Dr. Lance Robbins also listed on staff.
notes: Address (4905 Old Orchard Center, Suite 528, Skokie IL 60077) matches the record's normalized address exactly on the practice's own site, and the practice name matches ('P&E Dental' = 'P&E DENTAL P.C.'). The vendor hint (Weisbartendodontics.Com) is a different, unrelated endodontics practice in the same large shopping-center building — not this practice, not used. The vendor record's phone ((847) 676-9581) was independently found to belong to yet another unrelated neighboring tenant, Endodontics Limited (Suite 716); this practice's own site lists phone 847-675-3311. Given the exact address+name match on P&E Dental's own domain, this is treated as a vendor phone-field data-quality error (common in large multi-suite buildings with several unrelated dental specialists), not an ownership change/successor.

Address (4833 Church St, Skokie IL 60077) and phone ((847) 673-7118) match exactly on the practice's own location page. Site explicitly states it is part of 'Webster Dental Care' / 'Webster Dental Management,' a 10-location Chicagoland DSO/group headquartered in Edison Park — this is a chain location, not independent. Company-wide Paylocity careers page currently lists at least one Skokie-specific opening (Registered Dental Hygienist, map-linked to 4833 Church Street, Skokie IL). A separately-surfaced 'Patient Services Representative' listing was checked and found expired/inactive. The site references a 'Meet our Skokie doctors' roster page, but individual doctor names were not extracted within the per-practice research budget.
